scripts.build:zip: npm run build && cd dist && bestzip ../function.zip *
scripts.deploy:local: npm run build:zip && aws --endpoint-url=http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1 lambda create-function --function-name my-lambda --runtime nodejs18.x --handler handler.handler --role arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/irrelevant --zip-file fileb://function.zip
scripts.update:local: npm run build:zip && aws --endpoint-url=http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1 lambda update-function-code --function-name my-lambda --zip-file fileb://function.zip
scripts.invoke:local: aws --endpoint-url=http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1 lambda invoke --function-name my-lambda --cli-binary-format raw-in-base64-out --payload '{"body": "{\"filename\": \"direto-no-terminal.txt\", \"content\": \"Invocado\"}"}' response.json && cat response.json
